flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Utica University fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8k → 2.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Utica University rose 18% between 2006 and 2009 ($23.1k → $27.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Utica University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($24.2k → $26.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Utica University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).
